user.title: NAAF/Yr Pollen Forecast
user.description: Add forecast for selected pollen types for a given location

data_description.location_id: The code can be found in the URL of the location on yr.no (e.g., 1-189277)
data_description.location_name: Override the location name shown in sensor names. Leave empty to use the region name from the NAAF data.
data_description.pollen_types: Select which pollen types to create sensors for
data_description.update_frequency: How often to fetch a new forecast
data_description.language: Language used for sensor names and API data
